description_long: This object is a decorative potted plant featuring two tall, slender stems with clusters of vibrant purple-pink orchid flowers. The flowers are arranged in a natural, arching manner, with each stem supporting multiple blooms and a few unopened buds. The plant has broad, dark green leaves at its base, which emerge from a simple, smooth, light green plastic pot. The pot is cylindrical with a slightly flared rim and contains visible dark soil. The overall appearance is elegant and well-maintained, making it suitable for both modern and traditional urban interiors. There are no visible decorative patterns or labels on the pot.
description: A potted orchid with arching purple-pink flowers and broad green leaves in a plain light green plastic pot. The arrangement is elegant and suitable for indoor display.
description_view_0: Front view showing both orchid stems arching outward, with the pot and broad leaves clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the denser cluster of flowers on the right stem and the pot's cylindrical shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the arch of the stems away from the viewer and the back of the leaves and pot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the larger flower cluster and the open arrangement of the leaves around the pot.
